name: arsonkupik
description: ArSonKuPik public source, documentation, Chrome Web Store package tooling, and GitHub Pages site.

scripts.validate: npm run validate:extension && npm run validate:site && npm run validate:repo
scripts.validate:extension: cd extension && node --check src/background/service-worker.js && node --check src/offscreen/offscreen.js && node --check src/popup/popup.js && node --check src/studio/studio.js && node --check src/shared/audio-devices.js && node --check src/shared/messaging.js && node --check src/shared/presets.js && node --check src/shared/sfeq-rta.js && node tools/css-ownership-audit.mjs && node tools/extension-release-audit.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm run validate && npm run package:webstore && npm run package:source && npm run release:notes && npm run release:checksums
